title: React SDK and UI components
summary:
Official React and UI packages dropped, turning OAuth and wallet integration into a two-import job.

Wiring up OAuth and API key management is tedious. We added @pollinations_ai/sdk/react and @pollinations_ai/ui so you don't have to. Wrap your app in a PolliProvider, drop in the pre-built wallet components, and get back to building the actual app. SSR-safe hooks included.
